text.title: Embedding Generation Failure Modes
text.summary: 7 antipatterns observed across embedding-generation deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Production retrieval returns garbage scores after a "small upgrade".
antipattern.root-cause: Vector spaces incompatible across models; cross-model similarity is meaningless.
antipattern.fix: Treat model change as a full re-index event. Spin a parallel collection at new model, switch traffic atomically.

antipattern.root-cause: API call per text instead of batched.
antipattern.fix: Batch 256–1024 with provider cap. Sort by item.index on OpenAI before mapping back.

antipattern.symptom: Random recall regressions over time; no error in logs.
antipattern.root-cause: MD5 collisions at billion-doc scale return wrong embeddings.
antipattern.fix: Use SHA-256 cache keys composed of model_name + model_version + text.

antipattern.symptom: Cosine rankings dominated by vector magnitude; long docs ranked higher.
antipattern.root-cause: Unnormalized vectors mean magnitude affects similarity.
antipattern.fix: Pre-normalize to unit length before storing when cosine metric intended.

antipattern.symptom: Local embedding takes hours on 10k docs; "saves cost" but blocks deploys.
antipattern.fix: Use SentenceTransformers for local batch embedding; reserve Ollama for online single calls only.

antipattern.symptom: Tail-of-document content not represented in vector; semantic search misses it.
antipattern.root-cause: Overlong texts silently truncated at token limit.
antipattern.fix: Pre-tokenize + reject or chunk texts exceeding `max_input_tokens` before embedding.

antipattern.symptom: GPU OOM crash on second model load; multi-tenant service falls over.
antipattern.root-cause: Each instance loads multi-GB weights into GPU RAM.
antipattern.fix: Singleton SentenceTransformer per process. Share across requests via a worker queue + higher batch_size.
